title: Delhi Gymkhana Club news LIVE: Govt orders handover by June 5; members to write to L&DO seeking clarity
description: Delhi Gymkhana Club news LIVE: An order to vacate the iconic Gymkhana Club of Delhi has sparked reactions. The order, signed by deputy land and development officer Suchit Goyal, describes the premises as falling within a “highly sensitive and strategic area” of the capital.
